name: constellation
description: A 3D Neural-Visualization Cockpit for Multi-Agent CLI Orchestration

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:python"
scripts.dev:python: cd python && uv run uvicorn constellation.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.build: npm -w shared run build && npm -w server run build && npm -w client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck
